title: MonitorState
description: Structured snapshot emitted by the Claude batch monitor heartbeat worker.

taskId.description: Identifier for the batch task being monitored (e.g. PID, session ID, or manifest key).

state.description: Worker classification. See worker-heartbeat.md for transition rules.

elapsedMs.description: Milliseconds since the worker was launched.

lastOutputAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last stdout or stderr activity.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this snapshot was captured.

exitCode.description: Process exit code. Null while the worker is still running.

noOutputMs.description: Milliseconds since the last stdout/stderr output.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number this worker targets, if known.

prNumber.description: GitHub PR number opened by this worker, if any.

label.description: Mapped agent:* label derived from heartbeat state. running/running:no-output/stale/failed map to agent:running; done maps to agent:done. Used by the state reconciler as worker evidence.
